# job-radar v2 Phase 3 — Application Kit Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** One click on Apply produces the full application package — tailored resume + cover letter + outreach email — generated by `gemini-2.5-pro` under truthful re-emphasis rules, viewable/printable at `/kit/[jobId]`.

**Architecture:** Extend the adopted `tailor.ts` into `generateKit` (ONE pro call returns all three artifacts as JSON). New `kits` table replaces/extends `tailored` (kept for back-compat; kits is the new home). `/api/kit` POST/GET; `/kit/[jobId]` renders the resume print-styled (browser print → PDF) plus copyable cover/outreach. Feed's Apply fires kit generation in the background (fire-and-forget); pipeline cards link to the kit when it exists.

**Tech Stack:** unchanged; markdown rendered with a tiny in-house renderer (headings/bold/lists/paragraphs only — no new deps; resume markdown is fully under our prompt's control).

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-job-radar-v2-design.md` (Phase 3). Truthful rules are non-negotiable: reorder/re-emphasize/mirror-JD-terms only; NEVER invent employers, roles, dates, projects, skills, metrics, credentials; contact block verbatim.

---

## File Structure

| File | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| `src/lib/db.ts` (modify) | `kits` table (migration v3) + `saveKit`/`getKit`; JobRow `hasKit` flag |
| `src/lib/types.ts` (modify) | `Kit` interface; JobRow `hasKit: boolean` |
| `src/lib/tailor.ts` (rewrite) | `generateKit(db, client, jobId)` — one pro call → {resumeMd, coverMd, outreachMd}; keeps RULES |
| `src/lib/tailor.test.ts` (rewrite) | stub-client tests for generateKit |
| `src/app/api/kit/route.ts` (create) | POST {jobId} generate; GET ?jobId existing |
| `src/app/api/tailor/route.ts` (delete) | superseded by /api/kit |
| `src/app/kit/[jobId]/page.tsx` (create) | server: load kit+job → KitView |
| `src/app/kit/[jobId]/kit-view.tsx` (create) | client: tabs (Resume/Cover/Outreach), print + copy + regenerate |
| `src/lib/markdown.tsx` (create) | tiny md→React renderer (h1/h2/h3, bold, lists, paragraphs, hr) |
| `src/app/feed.tsx` (modify) | Apply also fires POST /api/kit (background); "Kit ready" affordance not needed (card leaves feed) |
| `src/app/board.tsx` (modify) | card link "Kit" → /kit/[id] when j.hasKit; "Make kit" button when applied & !hasKit |

```ts

// JobRow gains: hasKit: boolean;
```

- [ ] Failing tests:

```ts
it("saveKit/getKit round-trip and hasKit flag", () => {
  db.upsertJobs([job()]);
  const id = db.listJobs({})[0].id;
  expect(db.getJob(id)!.hasKit).toBe(false);
  db.saveKit(id, { resumeMd: "# R", coverMd: "C", outreachMd: "O" }, "gemini-2.5-pro");
  const k = db.getKit(id)!;
  expect(k.resumeMd).toBe("# R");
  expect(k.model).toBe("gemini-2.5-pro");
  expect(db.getJob(id)!.hasKit).toBe(true);
});

it("saveKit upserts (regenerate overwrites)", () => {
  db.upsertJobs([job()]);
  const id = db.listJobs({})[0].id;
  db.saveKit(id, { resumeMd: "v1", coverMd: "c", outreachMd: "o" }, "m");
  db.saveKit(id, { resumeMd: "v2", coverMd: "c", outreachMd: "o" }, "m");
  expect(db.getKit(id)!.resumeMd).toBe("v2");
});

it("getKit null for unknown", () => { expect(db.getKit("nope")).toBeNull(); });
```

- [ ] Implement: migration bumps `USER_VERSION` to 3; `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kits (job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, resume_md TEXT NOT NULL, cover_md TEXT NOT NULL, outreach_md TEXT NOT NULL, model TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL)` added to SCHEMA (fresh path) AND created in the `v < 3` upgrade branch (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS is idempotent — put it in SCHEMA only; the version bump just gates nothing extra, keep `addCol` style consistency by simply relying on SCHEMA exec; bump version anyway for future gates). SELECT gains `k.job_id IS NOT NULL as hasKit` + `LEFT JOIN kits k ON k.job_id = j.id`; toRow `hasKit: !!r.hasKit`.
- Db methods: `saveKit(jobId, kit: {resumeMd, coverMd, outreachMd}, model)` upsert; `getKit(jobId): Kit | null`.
- [ ] Full suite green, tsc, commit `kits storage (migration v3)`.

### Task 2: generateKit engine (TDD)

**Files:** Rewrite `src/lib/tailor.ts`, `src/lib/tailor.test.ts`

- [ ] `tailor.ts` becomes:

```ts
import type { Db } from "./db";
import type { GeminiClient } from "./types";
import { parseJson, PRO } from "./match";

const RULES = [
  "Rules — TRUTHFUL RE-EMPHASIS ONLY:",
  "- You may reorder sections, rewrite the professional summary, choose which projects/bullets to feature, and mirror the job description's terminology for skills the candidate genuinely has.",
  "- You may NOT invent employers, roles, dates, projects, skills, metrics, or credentials that are not in the base resume.",
  "- Keep the resume one page worth of content. Keep contact details exactly as-is.",
  "- Resume output: clean Markdown — # name, then sections (Summary, Core Skills, Experience, Projects, Education as applicable).",
  "- Cover letter: ≤250 words, specific to this company and role, no generic filler, signed with the candidate's name.",
  "- Outreach email: ≤120 words, written to a founder/recruiter, one concrete hook from the JD, one proof point from the resume, ends with a soft ask. Subject line on the first line as 'Subject: …'.",
].join("\n");

export interface KitDraft { resumeMd: string; coverMd: string; outreachMd: string; }

export async function generateKit(db: Db, client: GeminiClient, jobId: string): Promise<KitDraft> {
  const profile = db.getProfile();
  if (!profile || !profile.resumeText.trim()) throw new Error("no profile set — add your resume in /profile first");
  const job = db.getJob(jobId);
  if (!job) throw new Error("job not found");
  const prompt = [
    "Create a complete job-application kit for this candidate and job.",
    RULES,
    `BASE RESUME (single source of truth):\n${profile.resumeText}`,
    `CORE SKILLS: ${profile.coreSkills}`,
    `CANDIDATE PREFERENCES: ${profile.preferences ?? "none stated"}`,
    `TARGET JOB: ${job.title} at ${job.company}\n${job.description.slice(0, 3000)}`,
    'Return ONLY JSON: {"resumeMd": string, "coverMd": string, "outreachMd": string}.',
  ].join("\n\n");
  const raw = await client.generateJSON(PRO, prompt);
  const kit = parseJson<KitDraft>(raw);
  for (const k of ["resumeMd", "coverMd", "outreachMd"] as const) {
    if (!kit[k] || !kit[k].trim()) throw new Error(`empty ${k} in kit result`);
  }
  db.saveKit(jobId, kit, PRO);
  return kit;
}
```
(Drop `tailorResume` + `saveTailored` usage; the `tailored` table stays in schema for back-compat but nothing writes it anymore. Update/remove old tailor tests accordingly.)
- [ ] Tests (stub client): happy path persists via getKit + hasKit flips; no-profile throws without calling stub; job-not-found throws; empty artifact throws; fenced JSON parses. Full suite green, commit `generate full application kit (resume + cover + outreach)`.

### Task 3: API + kit page + UI hooks

**Files:** Create `src/app/api/kit/route.ts`, `src/app/kit/[jobId]/page.tsx`, `src/app/kit/[jobId]/kit-view.tsx`, `src/lib/markdown.tsx`; modify `src/app/feed.tsx`, `src/app/board.tsx`; delete `src/app/api/tailor/route.ts`.

- [ ] **api/kit/route.ts:**

```ts
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db } from "@/lib/server-db";
import { generateKit } from "@/lib/tailor";
import { geminiClient } from "@/lib/match";

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const { jobId } = await req.json().catch(() => ({}));
  if (!jobId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "jobId required" }, { status: 400 });
  try {
    const kit = await generateKit(db(), geminiClient(), jobId);
    return NextResponse.json(kit);
  } catch (e) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e) }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  const jobId = new URL(req.url).searchParams.get("jobId");
  if (!jobId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "jobId required" }, { status: 400 });
  const kit = db().getKit(jobId);
  if (!kit) return NextResponse.json({ error: "no kit yet" }, { status: 404 });
  return NextResponse.json(kit);
}
```

- [ ] **markdown.tsx** — minimal renderer, no deps, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML:

```tsx
import React from "react";

export function Markdown({ md }: { md: string }) {
  const blocks = md.replace(/\r/g, "").split(/\n{2,}/);
  const inline = (s: string) =>
    s.split(/(\*\*[^*]+\*\*)/g).map((part, i) =>
      part.startsWith("**") && part.endsWith("**") ? <strong key={i}>{part.slice(2, -2)}</strong> : part
    );
  return (
    <>
      {blocks.map((b, i) => {
        const t = b.trim();
        if (!t) return null;
        if (t.startsWith("### ")) return <h3 key={i}>{inline(t.slice(4))}</h3>;
        if (t.startsWith("## ")) return <h2 key={i}>{inline(t.slice(3))}</h2>;
        if (t.startsWith("# ")) return <h1 key={i}>{inline(t.slice(2))}</h1>;
        if (/^[-*] /m.test(t))
          return (
            <ul key={i}>
              {t.split("\n").filter((l) => /^[-*] /.test(l.trim())).map((l, j) => <li key={j}>{inline(l.trim().slice(2))}</li>)}
            </ul>
          );
        if (/^---+$/.test(t)) return <hr key={i} />;
        return <p key={i}>{t.split("\n").map((l, j) => <React.Fragment key={j}>{j > 0 && <br />}{inline(l)}</React.Fragment>)}</p>;
      })}
    </>
  );
}
```

- [ ] **kit/[jobId]/page.tsx** (server): `requireProfile()`; params per Next 15 are async — `const { jobId } = await params;` `const job = db().getJob(jobId)`; 404 (`notFound()`) when !job; pass `job` + `db().getKit(jobId)` (may be null) to KitView.
- [ ] **kit-view.tsx** (client): props {job, kit}. If kit null: explainer + **Generate kit** button (POST /api/kit, spinner "Writing your application with gemini-2.5-pro… ~30s", then setState with result). When kit present: tab bar (Resume / Cover letter / Outreach email), per-tab:
  - Resume tab: white card (`bg-white text-neutral-900 rounded-lg p-8 print:p-0 print:rounded-none`) rendering `<Markdown md={kit.resumeMd}/>` with print-friendly typography (`prose-like manual classes: [&_h1]:text-2xl [&_h1]:font-bold [&_h2]:text-base [&_h2]:font-semibold [&_h2]:mt-4 [&_h2]:border-b [&_li]:text-sm [&_p]:text-sm leading-snug`); buttons: **Print / Save PDF** (`window.print()`), **Copy Markdown** (navigator.clipboard).
  - Cover/Outreach tabs: dark `<pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap">` text + Copy button.
  - **Regenerate** button (POST /api/kit again, confirm via `confirm("Overwrite the current kit?")`).
  - Global print CSS in the page: `@media print { nav, .no-print { display: none !important; } body { background: white !important; } }` via a `<style>` tag; mark all chrome (tabs, buttons, nav) `no-print`.
- [ ] **feed.tsx** Apply hook: after the PATCH in `handleApply`, fire-and-forget `fetch("/api/kit", {method:"POST", headers:{"content-type":"application/json"}, body: JSON.stringify({jobId: j.id})}).catch(() => {})` — do NOT await (kit generates while the user reads the posting; visible later in Pipeline).
- [ ] **board.tsx** card: when `j.hasKit` → link `Kit ▸` (text-emerald-400 text-[10px], href `/kit/${j.id}`); else when `j.status === "applied"` → tiny button `Make kit` POSTing /api/kit then optimistic `hasKit: true`.
- [ ] Delete `src/app/api/tailor/route.ts`.
- [ ] tsc + tests + build green. Smoke on temp DB (JOBRADAR_DB, seeded profile+job+kit via saveKit): /kit/[id] renders tabs, resume white card, print CSS present; GET/POST api/kit behave (404 / 400 / generate-path NOT live-called — stub by pre-saving kit). Commit `kit page, api, feed/board hooks`.
